ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., country, state, province) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "population_2022" INTEGER /* Population of the region in 2022 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population growth record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the growth percentage is recorded */,
  "growth_percentage" REAL /* Population growth percentage for the year */,
  "urban_growth" REAL /* Urban population growth percentage for the year */,
  "rural_growth" REAL /* Rural population growth percentage for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year value */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., research paper, policy brief) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "tools_used" TEXT /* Tools and methods used in the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., statistical, predictive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "data_volume" REAL /* Volume of data imported in MB */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who created the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary researcher */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborating researcher */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the socio-economic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "relevant_regions" TEXT /* Regions where the factor is relevant */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of factor (e.g., economic, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factor */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the impact is recorded */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_impact_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_impact_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_impact_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_expertise" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., demography, economics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "expertise_area")
)
